subcodes.first_line: The Tree doth call aloud: "There is none other God but He, the Almighty, the All-Wise!" and the Rock doth cry out: "There is none other God..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تنادی السدره انه لا اله الا انا العزیز الحکیم و تصیح الصخره انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
